name: Bug report
about: Report a bug, accessibility regression, or unexpected behavior in Maida
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''

## Summary
<!-- One-sentence description of the problem. -->

## Environment
- **OS / Distro**: <!-- e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11, SteamOS 3.6 -->
- **Maida version**: <!-- from Settings page or VersionTag, e.g. 0.4.2 -->
- **Install type**: <!-- AppImage / .deb / .msi / NSIS / dev build (cargo run) -->
- **WebKit / WebView version** (Linux only): <!-- `dpkg -l | grep webkit2gtk-4.1` or equivalent -->
- **Hardware**: <!-- Steam Deck (Gaming Mode / Desktop Mode), laptop + gamepad, desktop, etc. -->

## Affected input methods
<!-- Mark all that apply. Different input paths can expose different bugs. -->
- [ ] Keyboard
- [ ] Mouse / touchpad
- [ ] Gamepad (D-pad, A/B, L1/R1, Menu)
- [ ] Gamepad (analog sticks: L-stick, R-stick)
- [ ] Touch screen
- [ ] Screen reader (specify: NVDA / JAWS / VoiceOver / Orca / TalkBack)

## Reproduction
Steps to reliably reproduce:
1. 
2. 
3. 

**Reproducibility**: always / sometimes / once

## Expected behavior
<!-- What should happen. -->

## Actual behavior
<!-- What does happen. Include exact error messages, console output, or screen-reader announcements if relevant. -->

## Screenshots / recordings
<!-- Drag images into this box, or paste a path. A short screen recording beats words for layout / timing bugs. -->

## Diagnostic output
<!-- Optional. DevTools console snippets, crash logs, `gh run view` output, etc. -->

```
```

## Impact
- [ ] Blocker — feature unusable
- [ ] Major — workaround exists but painful
- [ ] Minor — cosmetic or edge case
- [ ] Enhancement — not strictly a bug

## Additional context
<!-- Relevant upstream bugs, related PRs, prior reports, design decisions that might affect the fix. -->
